vulnerabilities.title: tiny-json-http missing SSL certificate validation
vulnerabilities.description: brianleroux tiny-json-http version all versions since commit [9b8e74a232bba4701844e07bcba794173b0238a8](https://github.com/brianleroux/tiny-json-http/commit/9b8e74a232bba4701844e07bcba794173b0238a8) (Oct 29 2016) contains a Missing SSL certificate validation vulnerability in The libraries core functionality is affected. that can result in Exposes the user to man-in-the-middle attacks.
